attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
   WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
   WI.AR_TRX_KEY,
   WI.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
   WI.PARTNER_TYPE_CD AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
   WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY AS DV_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
   WI.CHANNEL_FLG AS DV_CHANNEL_FLG ,
   WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG AS DV_CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG  ,
   WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY,
   WI.CHANNEL_FLG  DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_FLG,
   WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG,
   WI.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
   WI.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD  DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD,
   WI.DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
   WI.RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
   USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
   USER,
   WI.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHANNEL_MEASURE_RTM WI
   WHERE WI.DML_TYPE = 'I'

SEL
NREV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
,NREV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,NREV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD         
,NREV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY  
,BILLTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM
(SEL 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD         
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE 
WHERE 1=1
AND BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD'
AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD <> 'POS'
) NREV

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_CHANNEL_REV_MEASURE CHNL_REV
                ON NREV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CHNL_REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
                AND NREV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CHNL_REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
                AND NREV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CHNL_REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
                AND NREV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
                ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NREV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO_HIER BILLTO_HIER
                ON BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NREV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                AND BILLTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
                ON BILLTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
                AND BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
                AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
                ON NREV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
                ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
    ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SEL
NREV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
,NREV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,NREV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD         
,NREV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NBKGL.DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT , NPOSL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE ) AS POS_ORDER_DT 
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY  
,SOLDTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM
(SEL 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD         
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE 
WHERE 1=1
AND BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD <> 'DVAD'
AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'POS'
) NREV

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_CHANNEL_REV_MEASURE CHNL_REV
                ON NREV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CHNL_REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
                AND NREV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CHNL_REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
                AND NREV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CHNL_REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
                AND NREV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOSL
            ON NPOSL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NREV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NBKGL
            ON NBKGL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NREV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO_HIER SOLDTO_HIER
                ON SOLDTO_HIER.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NREV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                AND SOLDTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
                ON SOLDTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
                AND SOLDTO_HIER.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
                AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
                ON NREV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
                ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
    ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
